designFailures.prompt:
Return only a valid Bitcoin Miniscript policy. Use only pk, after, older, sha256, hash256, ripemd160, hash160, and, or, thresh. Do not explain. Do not add markdown. Do not add prose.

Request: Bitcoin account controlled by either one of two keys: a preferred one that is used most often (90% of the time) and an alternate one that is used in specific circumstances (10% of the time) or as backup
designFailures.prediction:
Use only pk, after, older, sha256, hash256, ripemd160, hash160, and, or, thresh. Do not explain. Do not add markdown. Do not add prose. pk = hash160(ripemd160(sha256(OR "key1" "key2")))
